title: DOFF Outdoor Cleaning Fluid Concentrate 1 Litre
features: CONCENTRATED - The single bottle of concentrated solution makes up to 80 litres of cleaning solution
POWERFUL - Treat a wide range of outdoor areas and surfaces It can be used on paths patios and other outdoor hard surfaces
EASY TO USE - Simply dilute the required amount of concentrate apply to the surface and leave to work No scrubbing or rinsing required
ALL YEAR ROUND - The Extra Tough concentrate is formulated to work all year round

DISINFECTS - The powerful formulation removes mould mildew and algae from hard surfaces breaks down odour causing bacteria in drains and bins Cleans and disninfects outdoor furniture greenhouses kennels and hutches
